## Summary

- What does this PR change?

## Type of change

- [ ] feature
- [ ] hotfix
- [ ] release
- [ ] docs/chore

## Branch info

- Source branch: `feature/*` or `hotfix/*` or `release/*`
- Target branch:
  - [ ] `develop`
  - [ ] `main`

## Validation checklist

- [ ] Backend checks pass (test/build)
- [ ] Frontend checks pass (lint/build)
- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] Conventional commit messages used

## Workflow confirmation

- [ ] After each task completed -> committed with conventional commit
- [ ] After each phase completed -> PR created
- [ ] Merge to `develop` only after review approval
- [ ] Merge `develop` to `main` only after QA pass
- [ ] If hotfix: merged to both `main` and `develop`

## Risks / rollback

- Risks:
- Rollback plan:
